Hero.subtitle: Costa Rica · Remote-friendly · Bilingual EN/ES
Hero.bio_suffix: . I build SaaS products and business websites from design to deployment.

About.heading: About
About.p1: Full-stack developer based in Limón, Costa Rica. Specialized in Next.js, TypeScript, and Supabase. I build complete web products from design to deployment — SaaS platforms, business websites, and custom systems.
About.p2: Background in bilingual technical support for U.S. companies (Experian, Foundever). Currently finishing a bachelor's in Software Engineering at Universidad Fidelitas.
About.p3: Freelancing under HerronDev, focused on clean, fast, and scalable digital solutions.

Projects.heading: Projects
Projects.nailflow_desc: SaaS platform for nail technicians. Appointments, automated emails, client management, SINPE Móvil payments, reports dashboard, and Lemon Squeezy subscriptions.
Projects.arenanegra_desc: E-commerce for an urban clothing brand. Custom design, product catalog, and full online presence.
Projects.inspection_desc: Bilingual (EN/ES) corporate website for a maritime inspection company. Contact forms and full i18n.

Experience.heading: Experience
Experience.herrondev_desc: Freelance. SaaS products and business websites with Next.js and Supabase. End-to-end ownership from design to production deployment.
Experience.experian_desc: Bilingual remote support (EN/ES) for U.S. credit services. Resolved technical and account issues for consumers and businesses.
Experience.foundever_desc: Bilingual technical support for U.S.-based clients. High-volume customer service in English and Spanish.

Contact.subtext: Available for freelance projects and remote full-time opportunities. Let's build something great.
